FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f0259743740>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-04-21T22:05:53Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-04-21T22:04:15Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-04-21T22:05:53Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-04-21T22:04:15Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert test_username in usernames, (
            f"Test user {test_username!r} not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/04/21 22:07:33.508652018 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508685839 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/04/21 22:07:33.508705338 {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508706640 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508718798 new <- list()
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508719800 if (!missing(width))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508732419 new$width <- width
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508733100 if (!missing(height))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508746410 new$height <- height
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508747331 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508763601 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/04/21 22:07:33.508798393 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508799114 if (!missing(version))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508813005 new$version <- version
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508813706 if (!missing(paper))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508834462 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508851733 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508859765 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508860566 if (!missing(bg))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508874928 new$bg <- bg
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508875619 if (!missing(fg))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508909249 new$fg <- fg
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508909950 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508922489 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508923180 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508936660 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508937311 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/04/21 22:07:33.508973416 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508974067 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508988769 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508989510 if (!missing(fillOddEven))

2026/04/21 22:07:33.509019154 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509033386 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509034087 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509050441 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509051342 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509068759 enc <- family$encoding
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509069390 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509085183 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509086014 "default"))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509102479 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509103220 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509118012 }
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509118734 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509129785 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509138628 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509146495 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509147357 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509164953 }
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509165744 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509179254 }
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509179925 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509193396 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509194127 if (is.null(pf))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509209079 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509209790 domain = NA)
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509226005 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509226716 }
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509240206 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509240977 old$family <- family
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509256671 }

2026/04/21 22:07:33.509317967 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509319650 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/04/21 22:07:33.509343906 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509360942 domain = NA)
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509361763 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509377747 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,

2026/04/21 22:07:33.509394161 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/04/21 22:07:33.508652018 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508685839 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/04/21 22:07:33.508705338 {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508706640 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508718798 new <- list()
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508719800 if (!missing(width))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508732419 new$width <- width
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508733100 if (!missing(height))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508746410 new$height <- height
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508747331 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508763601 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/04/21 22:07:33.508798393 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508799114 if (!missing(version))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508813005 new$version <- version
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508813706 if (!missing(paper))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508834462 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508851733 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508859765 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508860566 if (!missing(bg))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508874928 new$bg <- bg
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508875619 if (!missing(fg))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508909249 new$fg <- fg
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508909950 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508922489 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508923180 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508936660 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508937311 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/04/21 22:07:33.508973416 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508974067 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508988769 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/04/21 22:07:33.508989510 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509018363 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509019154 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509033386 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509034087 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509050441 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509051342 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509068759 enc <- family$encoding
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509069390 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509085183 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509086014 "default"))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509102479 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509103220 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509118012 }
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509118734 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509129785 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509138628 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509146495 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509147357 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509164953 }
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509165744 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509179254 }
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509179925 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509193396 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509194127 if (is.null(pf))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509209079 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509209790 domain = NA)
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509226005 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509226716 }
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509240206 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509240977 old$family <- family
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509256671 }
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509257382 version <- old$version

2026/04/21 22:07:33.509271092 "2.0")

2026/04/21 22:07:33.509317967 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509319650 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509343045 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509343906 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509360942 domain = NA)
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509361763 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/04/21 22:07:33.509377747 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,

2026/04/21 22:07:33.509394161 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
